liaison-supabase-db.description: PPEE Database Access: Used to verify the 'Truth-in-Memory' loop. Allows the AI to query the message_array JSONB and thread_links tables directly to ensure data integrity without user intervention.

liaison-visual-auditor.description: PPEE Vision Engine: Allows the AI to autonomously launch a headless browser, navigate to localhost:3000, and capture screenshots for the Midnight Guard design spec audit.

liaison-file-system.description: PPEE Core Memory: Grants the AI explicit read/write access to the Visual Audit Logs and MBRD rulesets so it can cross-reference code changes against the product spec.

liaison-git-ops.description: PPEE Deployment Ops: Enables the AI to stage, commit, and push atomic commits matching the Mjolnir-Certified structure.

liaison-knowledge-graph.description: PPEE Permanent Memory: Stores entities, relations, and architectural decisions permanently. Use this to remember the MBRD rules, user preferences, and cross-repo dependencies without needing the user to repeat them.

liaison-doc-fetcher.description: PPEE Live Context: Allows the AI to fetch and read raw HTML/Markdown from live web URLs. Use this to read the latest Supabase, Stripe, or Expo documentation when implementing new API methods.

liaison-stripe-ops.description: PPEE Revenue Verification: Allows the AI to execute authenticated cURL requests to the Stripe API (using local env vars) to verify webhook events, customer states, and Path E paywall conversions.

liaison-logic-engine.description: PPEE Deep Logic: Use this for complex architectural refactors. It provides a dynamic scratchpad for the AI to think through multi-step logic, evaluate alternatives, and self-correct before executing code.
